title: We have a client who uses the Microsoft Teams app throughout the company and wants to know if with the monday.com addon he can see the information as if he were on the monday.com website
excerpt: We have a client who uses the Microsoft Teams app throughout the company and wants to know if with the monday.com addon he can see the information as if he were on the monday.com website. Thanks

posts.author: Ggarcia (Gloria García)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a client who uses the Microsoft Teams app throughout the company and wants to know if with the monday.com addon he can see the information as if he were on the monday.com website. Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gloria,

The app allows you to connect monday.com boards to selected Microsoft teams channels and view them as tabs. The board/tab will offer the same features and functionalities as if you were accessing the board from the website. There’s even a monday.com bot to review notifications from specific boards and create action items.

Feel free to share this support article with your client: Microsoft Teams App

Hope this helps
